description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical body that transitions from a wide, stable base to a narrow tip. The cone is predominantly orange with a white upper section, typical of high-visibility safety equipment used in urban environments. The base is black, octagonal, and appears thick and weighted for stability, likely made of rubber or a similar heavy material. The surface of the cone is smooth with subtle vertical and horizontal lines, possibly from the manufacturing process. There are no visible reflective stripes, logos, or markings on the cone. The object appears clean and in new condition, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A bright orange and white traffic cone with a black, octagonal, weighted base and a smooth, clean surface. No reflective stripes or markings are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with a white top and a thick, black octagonal base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the same color scheme and base, with subtle vertical lines visible on the cone.
description_view_2: Direct side view emphasizing the smooth transition from the cone to the base and the clean, unmarked surface.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, again showing the orange and white cone with the sturdy black base and no visible markings.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and colored white, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is black, octagonal, thick, and appears weighted for stability, likely made of rubber with a smooth finish and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears new and clean, with no visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
